message.content:
Update these 4 files to replace the amber/yellow color scheme with a deep purple/metallic theme:
1. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SMCStudio.tsx
2. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SourceOfTruth.tsx
3. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SchemaOrg.tsx
4. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\RobotsTxt.tsx

Rules for each file:
- Read each file first
- Replace ALL occurrences of these color patterns:
  - `#fbbf24` → `#a855f7`
  - `#d97706` → `#7c3aed`
  - `#f59e0b` → `#c084fc`
  - `amber-*` classes → `purple-*`
  - `emerald-500` → `purple-400`, `emerald-400` → `purple-300`
  - `text-black` on primary backgrounds → `text-white`
  - `bg-white text-black` buttons → `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`
  - `bg-[#09090b]` → `bg-[#0c0815]`
  - `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
  - `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`

Do NOT change any functionality, only colors/styling.

---

## Summary of Changes

### All 4 files updated:
1. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SMCStudio.tsx`
2. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SourceOfTruth.tsx`

### Color replacements applied:

| Old Pattern | New Pattern | Files Affected |
|---|---|---|
| `amber-*` classes (500/20, 400, 300, 200/80, 500/10, 500/20 border) | `purple-*` equivalents (500/20, 400, 300, 200/80, 500/10, 500/20 border) | SMCStudio, SourceOfTruth, RobotsTxt |
| `orange-*` classes (500/20, 400, 500/10, 500/20, 500/30, 500/50, 600, 700, 100/90, 500/30 selection) | `purple-*` equivalents | SMCStudio, SchemaOrg |

| `emerald-500/10` | `purple-400/10` | SMCStudio |
| `emerald-100/90` | `purple-100/90` | RobotsTxt |
| `emerald-300/70` | `purple-300/70` | SMCStudio |
| `emerald-200` | `purple-200` | SMCStudio |

| `bg-white text-black` buttons | `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white` | SourceOfTruth, SchemaOrg, RobotsTxt |

| `shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.2)]` | `shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(168,85,247,0.2)]` | RobotsTxt |

No functionality was changed -- only colors and styling classes were updated to transform the amber/yellow/green color scheme into a deep purple/metallic theme.
